name: HEIC to JPG
description: Convert HEIC/HEIF photos to JPG locally in your browser.
title: HEIC to JPG
dropHint: Drag and drop HEIC/HEIF files here or use file picker
cameraActionHint: The converted JPG image will emerge below the camera.
photoDownloadHint: Press the ejected photo to download it.
empty: Select or drag a HEIC/HEIF image to start.
